calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Samuel M. Zaif, Esq. for S.F. American Taxicab, Inc., Respondent/Plaintiff, Kathleen McCann Manager of SF American Taxicab and Taxi driver Mohammed Al-Ali who are also present.
Deborah T. Bjonerud, Esq. for Lily Huey, Appellant/Defendant, who is also present.

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. The parties were sworn and testified on their own behalf.

Both sides introduced numerous new exhibits at this hearing including photographs.

After both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.

Court order parties to pick up their own exhibits.

Judge: Charlene P. Rosack, Judge Pro Tem; Clerk: Leelay Chin; not reported (D. 525)
